disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Two-week history of prolonged low-grade fever with chills and drenching night sweats
trigger_question_examples: How long have you had the fever?
Tell me about the fevers and sweats.
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's been about two weeks now — a low fever that keeps coming back, shivering, and night sweats so heavy they soak the sheets.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Sudden appearance of painful, tender, red nodules on the pads of the fingers (embolic/immune peripheral lesions)
trigger_question_examples: Tell me about the bumps on your fingers.
When did the finger lesions appear and are they painful?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: They came up suddenly yesterday — sore, red, raised bumps right on the pads of my index and middle fingers, and they're really tender to touch.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Profound fatigue, generalised myalgia and ~3 kg unintentional weight loss over two weeks
trigger_question_examples: How are you feeling in yourself overall?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm completely drained, aching all over, and I've dropped about 3 kilos without trying — I'm mostly stuck in bed.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Known bicuspid aortic valve (a structural heart valve abnormality present since birth)
trigger_question_examples: Do you have any heart conditions?
Any known problems with your heart valves?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes — I was told years ago I was born with a bicuspid aortic valve. It's just been watched now and then, I don't take anything for it.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Thin dark reddish-brown streaks under several fingernails (splinter haemorrhages)
trigger_question_examples: Any marks or streaks under your nails?
Have you noticed anything under your fingernails?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Now that you mention it, yes — there are little dark reddish lines under a few of my nails that I only just noticed.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Only home treatment has been regular paracetamol with minimal relief; lives alone and too weak to prepare adequate nutrition
trigger_question_examples: What have you taken for it so far?
Are you managing okay at home on your own?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Just paracetamol, which barely helps. I live on my own and honestly I've been too weak to cook or look after myself these last couple of weeks.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Pertinent negatives — denies chest pain, denies blood in the urine, denies focal weakness or slurred speech
trigger_question_examples: Any chest pain, blood in your urine, or weakness on one side?
Have you had any stroke-like symptoms?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No chest pain, no blood in my wee that I've seen, and no weakness or trouble speaking — just the fever, the exhaustion and these finger bumps.
